sourceSummary.oneLine: Approval sheet for MC_ABYZ_FRONT_DECO_SHEET, part number MSH-200012, applicable to model HAD1717MC.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supplier approval documentation including revision history, material list, QC process flow, and control plan information for the deco sheet part.
keyPoints: Customer is ㈜H&abyz and supplier is 모아스크린.
Product name is MC_ABYZ_FRONT_DECO_SHEET and drawing/model number is MSH-200012.
The document includes a comprehensive raw material list covering PC Q42, double-sided tape ST-9108, and ink PAS 800.
The QC/control plan identifies mass production and SOP category, with process controls for incoming inspection, printing, lamination, cutting, inspection, packaging, and shipping inspection.

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit regulatory authority or jurisdiction appears in the source text; authoritySignal metadata says FDA but the document content does not state FDA.
No formal regulatory standards are identified in the source text.
Revision evidence is not fully consistent: cover shows Rev. 00, approval revision history includes Rev. 1 dated 1/10/25, and QC section shows Revision No. 0.
Some extracted text appears to be spreadsheet/OCR-style CSV output with irregular spacing and blank fields.
